news.title:
Fertilizer stocks Chambal, RCF, FACT, and Deepak surged up to 11% after the Natural Gas Regulation Order, 2026.
FACT stock rose 11.4%, driven by low free float; RCF and Chambal gained 6.6% and 5.7%, respectively.
news.summary:
Fertilizer stocks Chambal, RCF, FACT, and Deepak surged up to 11% after the Natural Gas Regulation Order, 2026.
FACT stock rose 11.4%, driven by low free float; RCF and Chambal gained 6.6% and 5.7%, respectively.

news.title:
Fertiliser stocks Chambal, RCF, GNFC may dip as LNG supply disruption from Qatar impacts urea production.
India's fertiliser firms cut output; prolonged supply issues could force shutdowns amid spiking global LNG prices.
news.summary:
Fertiliser stocks Chambal, RCF, GNFC may dip as LNG supply disruption from Qatar impacts urea production.
India's fertiliser firms cut output; prolonged supply issues could force shutdowns amid spiking global LNG prices.

news.title:
RCF announces Shri Ajit A. Thatte's promotion to GM, effective March 1, 2026.
Ajit Thatte has 34+ years of experience and holds degrees in Petrochemical Engg. & Industrial Safety.
news.summary:
RCF announces Shri Ajit A. Thatte's promotion to GM, effective March 1, 2026.
Ajit Thatte has 34+ years of experience and holds degrees in Petrochemical Engg. & Industrial Safety.

news.title:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.
news.summary:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.

news.title:
Rashtriya Chemicals & Fertilizers Ltd's board approved an interim dividend of Rs.1 per share for FY 2025-26.
Record date for dividend eligibility is set as February 20, 2026, with payment by March 13, 2026.
news.summary:
Rashtriya Chemicals & Fertilizers Ltd's board approved an interim dividend of Rs.1 per share for FY 2025-26.
Record date for dividend eligibility is set as February 20, 2026, with payment by March 13, 2026.

news.title:
RCF board approves 300 MTPD Phosphoric Acid plant at Thai unit.
Project costs ₹865.25 crore, completion in 24 months via debt-equity mix.
news.summary:
RCF board approves 300 MTPD Phosphoric Acid plant at Thai unit.
Project costs ₹865.25 crore, completion in 24 months via debt-equity mix.

news.title: RCF's Q3 revenue declined to 42.4B rupees from 45.2B YoY.
news.summary: RCF's Q3 revenue declined to 42.4B rupees from 45.2B YoY.

news.title: Rashtriya Chemicals & Fertilizers posted Q3 net profit of ₹814M, up from ₹797M YoY.
news.summary: Rashtriya Chemicals & Fertilizers posted Q3 net profit of ₹814M, up from ₹797M YoY.

news.title:
RCF schedules board meeting on February 12, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended December 2025.
The board will also consider an interim dividend and trading window closure continues till February 14, 2026, for designated persons.
news.summary:
RCF schedules board meeting on February 12, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended December 2025.
The board will also consider an interim dividend and trading window closure continues till February 14, 2026, for designated persons.

news.title:
Rashtriya Chemicals granted patent for fertilizer coating system by Indian Patent Office.
Patent No. 578371 is valid for 20 years starting March 19, 2024.
news.summary:
Rashtriya Chemicals granted patent for fertilizer coating system by Indian Patent Office.
Patent No. 578371 is valid for 20 years starting March 19, 2024.

news.title:
ICRA has withdrawn its ICRA AA (Stable) rating for Rashtriya Chemicals & Fertilizers Ltd's Rs. 500 crore NCDs after full redemption.
There are no outstanding amounts against these rated instruments as confirmed by the company.
news.summary:
ICRA has withdrawn its ICRA AA (Stable) rating for Rashtriya Chemicals & Fertilizers Ltd's Rs. 500 crore NCDs after full redemption.
There are no outstanding amounts against these rated instruments as confirmed by the company.

news.title:
Rashtriya Chemicals faces Rs 8.6 cr GST demand, including penalty and interest.
The issue pertains to Reverse Charge Mechanism from Apr 2018 to Mar 2023.
news.summary:
Rashtriya Chemicals faces Rs 8.6 cr GST demand, including penalty and interest.
The issue pertains to Reverse Charge Mechanism from Apr 2018 to Mar 2023.

news.title:
Bombay HC nullifies arbitration favoring Rashtriya Chemicals, orders Rs 218.5 cr refund plus 6% interest to Thermax.
The case pertains to damages from two gas turbo generator breakdowns; company has 4 weeks for legal remedy.
news.summary:
Bombay HC nullifies arbitration favoring Rashtriya Chemicals, orders Rs 218.5 cr refund plus 6% interest to Thermax.
The case pertains to damages from two gas turbo generator breakdowns; company has 4 weeks for legal remedy.

news.title:
Morocco's OCP expects phosphate exports to India to rise 40% in CY2025, reaching over 2.5 mt, driven by demand for DAP and TSP.
OCP collaborates with Indian firms like PPL, Chambal Fertilisers, RCF, and NFL; promotes customised fertilisers for healthier soils and better yields.
news.summary:
Morocco's OCP expects phosphate exports to India to rise 40% in CY2025, reaching over 2.5 mt, driven by demand for DAP and TSP.
OCP collaborates with Indian firms like PPL, Chambal Fertilisers, RCF, and NFL; promotes customised fertilisers for healthier soils and better yields.

news.title:
RCF fined Rs. 5.4L by NSE, BSE for non-compliance with SEBI LODR Regulation 17(1).
Notice pertains to Q3 ending Sept 2025; company seeks waiver of fines.
news.summary:
RCF fined Rs. 5.4L by NSE, BSE for non-compliance with SEBI LODR Regulation 17(1).
Notice pertains to Q3 ending Sept 2025; company seeks waiver of fines.

news.title:
Ms. Nazhat J. Shaikh, Director (Finance), has been given additional charge as CMD of Rashtriya Chemicals & Fertilizers Ltd.
The role is effective January 1, 2026, for six months or until a regular appointment is made.
news.summary:
Ms. Nazhat J. Shaikh, Director (Finance), has been given additional charge as CMD of Rashtriya Chemicals & Fertilizers Ltd.
The role is effective January 1, 2026, for six months or until a regular appointment is made.

news.title:
RCF reported no deviations in fund utilization for NCD proceeds as per SEBI regulations.
Board approved unaudited financial results and related disclosures for the quarter ending September 30, 2025.
news.summary:
RCF reported no deviations in fund utilization for NCD proceeds as per SEBI regulations.
Board approved unaudited financial results and related disclosures for the quarter ending September 30, 2025.

news.title:
RCF reports Q2 revenue at ₹5,292.6 Cr, H1 at ₹8,663.2 Cr.
Q2 PAT stands at ₹105.7 Cr, H1 at ₹159.8 Cr; subsidy and gas issues noted.
news.summary:
RCF reports Q2 revenue at ₹5,292.6 Cr, H1 at ₹8,663.2 Cr.
Q2 PAT stands at ₹105.7 Cr, H1 at ₹159.8 Cr; subsidy and gas issues noted.

news.title:
RCF announces a board meeting on Nov 14, 2025, to review Q2 and H1 financial results.
Trading window for RCF securities remains closed until Nov 16, 2025, per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
RCF announces a board meeting on Nov 14, 2025, to review Q2 and H1 financial results.
Trading window for RCF securities remains closed until Nov 16, 2025, per SEBI regulations.
